creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Comment on attachment 169852
Patch to update multimedia/qmmp

>Index: Makefile
>===================================================================
>--- Makefile	(revision 414415)
>+++ Makefile	(working copy)
>@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
> # $FreeBSD$
> 
> PORTNAME=	qmmp
>-PORTVERSION=	0.9.7
>-PORTREVISION=	1
>+PORTVERSION=	0.9.8
> CATEGORIES=	multimedia
> MASTER_SITES=	http://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/files/ \
> 	SF/qmmp-dev/${PORTNAME}/
>@@ -14,7 +13,8 @@
> 
> CONFLICTS=	${PORTNAME}-qt5-1.*
> 
>-USES=		cmake:outsource desktop-file-utils pathfix pkgconfig tar:bzip2
>+USES=		cmake:outsource desktop-file-utils localbase pathfix \
>+		pkgconfig tar:bzip2
> USE_QT4=	corelib gui network xml \
> 		linguisttools_build moc_build qmake_build rcc_build uic_build
> USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
>@@ -324,8 +324,6 @@
> 
> CMAKE_ARGS+=	-DUSE_FFMPEG_LEGACY:BOOL=FALSE \
> 	-DCMAKE_REQUIRED_INCLUDES:PATH=${LOCALBASE}/include
>-CFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
>-LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
> 
> post-patch:
> 	@${GREP} -L '${LOCALBASE}/lib/oss' \
>Index: distinfo
>===================================================================
>--- distinfo	(revision 414415)
>+++ distinfo	(working copy)
>@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
>-SHA256 (qmmp-0.9.7.tar.bz2) = 339f260c8fac0c1ddcf4205b852724c0633e63a39d83ee1906b9661ef821bcdc
>-SIZE (qmmp-0.9.7.tar.bz2) = 1125295
>+SHA256 (qmmp-0.9.8.tar.bz2) = 83ca64e222b8b02a0515511d8187667f1d44a71281cf36eb0fe05560c88b1911
>+SIZE (qmmp-0.9.8.tar.bz2) = 1125404
